prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华东师范大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约574名、748名、960名、1104名、856名。近五年位次波动较大，2023–2024年连续后移，2025年 明显回升至856名，回升幅度约248名，显示报考热度有所回温；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021年18人、2022年15人、2023年12人、2024年13人、2025年13人；2026年计划缩减至9人，较2025年减少约30.8%，缩招幅度显著，理论上使竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东师范大学是教育部直属的985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校 ，软科中国大学主榜排名约第29名（2026年），近年排名稳定在前30，属于国内顶尖师范类高校；2026年高考周期声誉评价中未见华东师范大学负面信号；抖音 学校热度总排名第28位，评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量中等偏上，反映报考关注度较为平稳。历史投档异常记录中未出现该校断档或暴跌信号；第五轮学科评估 中，华东师范大学拥有A+学科2个（教育学、统计学、体育学），A学科5个（心理学、中国语言文学、数学、地理学、软件工程、世界史、生态学），A-学科3个（外国语言文学、 物理学、生物学、马克思主义理论），A-及以上共14个，学科实力雄厚，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在海南招生专业涉及数学与应用数学、计算机科学与 技术（计算机类热度偏热但近年明显降温）、汉语言文学（推荐偏热）、英语（一般观望）、微电子科学与工程（电子信息/通信高热推荐）。海南省考生总数2021年约5.3万人持 续增长至2025年约6.7万人，2026年预估约7.8万人（不确定），考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次856名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减约30.8%（缩招使位次数字上移）、海南省考生规模持续扩大（竞争加剧）以及学校声誉平稳、学科实力 强劲等因素，但考虑考生规模增长和缩招的综合效应，适度上调预测位次。预测2026年最低录取位次约728名，区间655–801名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次728名处于区间655–801名中部。位次优于区间上限（801名以外）可重点冲刺一档的数学与应用数学、物理学等王牌基础学科；位次在区间内建议以二档的微电子科学与 工程、计算机科学与技术、汉语言文学为主攻方向，兼顾学科实力与就业热度；位次低于区间下限（655名以内）可考虑三档的化学、英语作为保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for East China Normal University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 574, 748, 960, 1104, and 856 respectively. Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past five years, with a continuous decline in 2023–2024, followed by a notable rebound to 856 in 2025, an increase of about 248 places, indicating a recovery in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 18 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 9, a decrease of about 30.8% compared to 2025, a significant reduction that theoretically intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a directly affiliated institution of the Ministry of Education, a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, maintaining a stable position in the top 30 in recent years, making it a top-tier normal university in China. No negative signals were observed in the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranks 28th, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium-to-high short video exposure, reflecting stable application attention. There are no historical records of abnormal admissions such as gaps or sharp drops. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, East China Normal University has 2 A+ disciplines (Education, Statistics, Physical Education), 5 A disciplines (Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics, Geography, Software Engineering, World History, Ecology), and 3 A- disciplines (Foreign Languages and Literature, Physics, Biology, Marxist Theory), totaling 14 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Hainan include Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Computer Science and Technology (computer category is relatively hot but has cooled significantly in recent years), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended as relatively hot), English (generally wait-and-see), and Microelectronics Science and Engineering (electronics/information communication is highly hot and recommended). The total number of candidates in Hainan Province increased from about 53,000 in 2021 to about 67,000 in 2025, with an estimated 78,000 in 2026 (uncertain), and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 856, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan by about 30.8% (which numerically pushes the ranking upward), the continuous expansion of the candidate pool in Hainan Province (intensifying competition), the stable reputation of the university, and its strong academic strength, but also taking into account the combined effects of candidate growth and enrollment reduction, the predicted ranking is moderately adjusted upward. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 728, with a range of 655–801.

- Physics
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Computer Science and Technology
- Chinese Language and Literature
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 728 is in the middle of the range 655–801. Candidates with rankings better than the upper limit (outside 801) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Mathematics and Applied Mathematics and Physics, which are flagship basic disciplines. Candidates within the range are advised to target Tier 2 majors such as Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, and Chinese Language and Literature as the main direction, balancing academic strength and employment popularity. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (within 655) can consider Tier 3 majors such as Chemistry and English as safe choices.
